channel.title: #Matrix Scanning · keyboard wire
channel.description: All keyboard wire entries tagged Matrix Scanning.

item.title: QMK discussion on verifying NKRO status without magic key combos
item.description: Discussion on verifying NKRO status in QMK without relying on magic key combos, noting issues with key rollover limits. — 5 pts · 21 comments · r/olkb

item.title: QMK matrix implementation can be used as a custom lite matrix
item.description: Technical discussion on leveraging QMK's matrix scanning code for custom firmware. — 1 pts · 2 comments · r/olkb
